summary: Comprehensive testing of Horizon Sports Platform after backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular architecture. All 38 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tested with Playwright - all critical flows working correctly.

minor.issue: Redis unavailable in test env - slot locking disabled (expected behavior)

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register - Register new player (unique email, returns token)
GET /api/venues/{id}/slots?date=2026-02-17 - Get venue slots with prices and status
POST /api/venues - Only venue owners can create (player gets 403)
frontend_tests_passed: Landing page loads with hero content, stats, CTA buttons
Login page with Log In / Sign Up tabs, demo credentials visible
Login flow works - redirects to /player dashboard
Player dashboard shows welcome message, stats, upcoming bookings
Venues list page shows 4 venues with images, ratings, prices, amenities
Venue detail page shows calendar date picker and slot grid
Slot grid shows multiple turfs with availability and dynamic pricing
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - all routes properly organized into modular files
All API endpoints maintain same functionality as before refactoring
MongoDB _id properly excluded from all responses
JWT authentication working correctly across all protected routes
Role-based access control enforced (admin, venue_owner, player, coach)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created test bookings and matches via API. All test data prefixed appropriately.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring from monolithic 1833-line server.py to modular architecture complete and verified. All API endpoints working correctly. Redis is unavailable in this environment (expected) so slot locking is disabled. Payment gateway uses mock fallback when Razorpay keys not configured. Frontend fully functional with all views working - landing, login, dashboard, venues list, venue detail with slot calendar.

mocked_apis.Razorpay payment processing: MOCKED - payment gateway falls back to mock mode when no gateway keys configured
mocked_apis.Redis slot locking: UNAVAILABLE - Redis not running in test environment, slot locking disabled

feature_verification.auth_module: VERIFIED - register, login, profile update, JWT auth all working
feature_verification.venues_module: VERIFIED - CRUD, slot generation, pricing rules working
feature_verification.bookings_module: VERIFIED - create, list, cancel, mock payment flow working
feature_verification.matchmaking_module: VERIFIED - create, list, join matches working
feature_verification.mercenary_module: VERIFIED - list, create, apply endpoints working
feature_verification.notifications_module: VERIFIED - get, unread count, mark read working
feature_verification.admin_module: VERIFIED - dashboard stats, user management, settings working
